global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: The ad promotes a food delivery service with an emphasis on freshness.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top that reads 'Hungry? We got you'.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that says 'Fresh favorites nearby'.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A simple logo design featuring the text 'SnapMeal' in a modern font.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom that reads 'Start now' in bold text.

elements.label: Visual decoration
elements.description: A subtle decorative element that enhances the overall design without being distracting.
